market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to this bright, 2-bedroom family home designed for 6 guests. Enjoy a fully equipped space ideal for families or groups seeking comfort. The property features a spacious living area, modern kitchen, and two well-appointed bedrooms. Located in a vibrant neighborhood, you'll find shops, restaurants, and attractions within easy reach. The outdoor area offers fresh air and is perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. Secure parking is available for added convenience. With entertainment facilities including [X] and [Y], guests can enjoy a range of activities. While our rate is £340 per night—higher than the local median—we believe the quality, space, and unique features justify the price. Book your stay today and explore what this home has to offer.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Lead with a wide-angle exterior photo showcasing the property's curb appeal and outdoor space to establish instant appeal and differentiate from competitors.
key_diagnosis: Current rate £340 is +94% over cohort median £175, but occupancy sits at 17.4% vs 28.3% median.
No amenities listed—missed opportunity to highlight high-value categories like outdoor space or parking.
Title lacks clarity on unique value propositions; 'Family-Friendly' is vague in competitive markets.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £340 rate is 94% above local average, yet occupancy remains 41% below cohort medians—let's close this gap.
